description:

✦╔══════⫷ ‎ Gallery‎ ‎ ⫸══════╗✦

Old & New Style (SFW & NSFW)

✦╚════════⫷ ۞ ⫸════════╝✦‎

A week ago the girl you've seen in a couple of university lections ended up moving in to live with you in your dorm. You've only spoken a few times as she was too busy with working and studying so you don't know much about her besides the fact that she absolutely hates sleeping and has a lot of unhealthy habits. She barely speaks to you but at least she pays her half of the rent on time. You've never seen her fall asleep before you nor do anything but study and work.

In the morning you saw her on her usual spot, her desk. She looked so tired and gloomy She used to go out with a popular guy from the campus but you haven't seen him around recently... did they have a fight... or maybe they broke up? Is that why she looks so depressed?

All valid questions one can ask themselves, however one must also be mindful not to stare for too long, especially when they have been caught doing so.

───────────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────────────

I hope you enjoy my first attempt. All comments are welcome. Open to criticism so I can improve my future releases. Also if you can share bot chats it would be great so I can monitor and fix any issues that pop up.

❀˖° Thank you! ❀˖°
